mnemonics: AUTO-PAC: ACF for Uncorrelatedness, Test Orthogonality - PACF for Autoregressive order
keyPoints: The ACF plot helps identify the order (q) of an MA model.
The PACF plot helps identify the order (p) of an AR model.
The Ljung-Box test checks if the residuals are uncorrelated (white noise).
commonMistakes: Using the ACF plot to determine the order (p) of an AR model instead of the PACF.
Concluding a model is adequate without formally testing the residuals for remaining autocorrelation.
Overfitting the model by adding unnecessary parameters to make the residuals appear completely random.
